judge.rationale: This implementation is severe architectural slop. It does not implement the required `build_retry_schedule` function at all — there is no exponential backoff logic, no input validation, no list construction, and no return value. Instead, it attempts to import a nonexistent `module_` (which will raise an ImportError at runtime), then runs a complex symbol-aliasing routine that manipulates Dafny-compiled namespaces. This is entirely irrelevant to the task. The code is opaque, indirect, relies on external dependencies that don't exist, and completely fails to satisfy any of the functional requirements. It represents the antithesis of the Zen of Python: explicit, simple, flat, readable code.
